Conner Net (mine).name: Conner Net (mine)
Conner Net (mine).description:
2000 (4000) cr

30 (60) lb

Upon detonation, a conner net deploys on la cible, which must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). On a failed sauvegarde, the ship is étourdi pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Proton Bomb.name: Proton Bomb
Proton Bomb.description:
2100 (4200) cr

32 (65) lb

When a proton bomb detonates, each ship within 100 [200] mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). A ship takes 4d10 [8d10] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

Adv. Cluster Missile.name: Adv. Cluster Missile
Adv. Cluster Missile.description:
(portée 600/2 400), automatique, rafale 6, explosif, rapide 6

20 (40) lb

3d6 (6d6) cinétique

Conner Net (missile).name: Conner Net (missile)
Conner Net (missile).description:
(Range 600/2400), special

85 (170) lb

On a failed jet de sauvegarde for a missile, a conner net deploys on la cible, which must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). On a failed sauvegarde, the ship is étourdi pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Twin auto-blaster.name: Twin auto-blaster
Twin auto-blaster.description: Puissance (plage 250/1000), automatique, rafale 10, cachée, surchauffe 20, rapide 5

S-Thread Tracer.name: S-Thread Tracer
S-Thread Tracer.description:
(Portée 1200/4800), spécial

50 (100) lb

Sur un jet de sauvegarde en panne, le missile verrouille un traceur S-thread sur la cible. Lors d'un test d'Intelligence (Sonde) pour détecter le déplacement hyperspatial du vaisseau à filetage S, son angle de départ peut être détecté sur un jet de 15 au lieu de 25.

Adv. Concussion Missile.name: Adv. Concussion Missile
Adv. Concussion Missile.description:
(Plage 800/3 200), automatique, rafale 1, explosif, rapide 1

125 (250) lb

2d10 (4d10) énergie

Seismic Charge.name: Seismic Charge
Seismic Charge.description:
2000 (4000) cr

30 (60) lb

When a seismic charge detonates, each ship within 150 [300] mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). A ship takes 1d10 [2d10] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

Homing Cluster Missile.name: Homing Cluster Missile
Homing Cluster Missile.description:
(portée 600/2 400), automatique, rafale 6, explosif, à tête chercheuse, rapide 6

15 (30) lb

3d4 (6d4) cinétique

Flechette Torpedo.name: Flechette Torpedo
Flechette Torpedo.description:
(Range 600/2400), special

85 (170) lb

A Flechette torpedo detonates at a point within range, creating a 200 (400) foot cube of difficult terrain. Any ship entering or starting their turn in this area must succeed at a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15) or take 1d8 [2d8] kinetic dégâts.

Pulse Bomb.name: Pulse Bomb
Pulse Bomb.description:
2300 (4600) cr

35 (70) lb

When a pulse bomb detonates, each ship within 200 [400] mètres must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). A ship takes 2d10 [4d10] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, it is ionized pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success. Ships larger than you have avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Adv. Homing Cluster Missile.name: Adv. Homing Cluster Missile
Adv. Homing Cluster Missile.description:
(portée 600/2 400), automatique, rafale 6, explosif, à tête chercheuse, rapide 6

25 (50) lb

3d6 (6d6) cinétique

Discord Missile.name: Discord Missile
Discord Missile.description:
(Range 600/2400), special

85 (170) lb

On a failed jet de sauvegarde, the missile deploys pistoeka sabotage or "buzz" droids on la cible. At the end of each of la cible ship's turns, la cible ship gains one niveau of system dégâts. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship attempt their choice of a dexterity or constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD 15), ending the effect on a success.

EMP Bomb.name: EMP Bomb
EMP Bomb.description:
2300 (4600) cr

45 (90) lb

When an EMP bomb detonates, each ship within 150 [300] mètres must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship is étourdi pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Cluster Missile.name: Cluster Missile
Cluster Missile.description:
(portée 600/2 400), automatique, rafale 6, explosif, rapide 6

10 (20) lb

3d4 (6d4) cinétique

Gravity Mine.name: Gravity Mine
Gravity Mine.description:
2000 (4000) cr

30 (60) lb

Rather than exploding on contact, gravity mines detonate any time a ship comes within range of it. When a gravity mine detonates, it creates a mass shadow centered on the point of detonation with a radius of 50 [100] mètres that lasts for 10 minutes. Any ships contacting this mass shadow are unable to activate their hyperdrives.

Homing Torpedo.name: Homing Torpedo
Homing Torpedo.description:
(portée 1 200/4 800), explosif, à tête chercheuse

25 (50) lb

1d12 (2d12) énergie

Glop Bomb.name: Glop Bomb
Glop Bomb.description:
2000 (4000) cr

30 (60) lb

When a glop bomb detonates, each ship within 50 [100] mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of their turns, a crew member can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success. Ships larger than you have avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Bomblet.name: Bomblet
Bomblet.description:
1200 (2400) cr

16 (32) lb

When a bomblet detonates, each ship within 50 [100] mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). A ship takes 1d10 [2d10] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

Concussion Missile.name: Concussion Missile
Concussion Missile.description:
(portée 600/2 400), automatique, rafale 1, explosif, rapide 1

75 (150) lb

2d8 (4d8) énergie

Gravity Bomb.name: Gravity Bomb
Gravity Bomb.description:
2200 (4400) cr

40 (80) lb

Rather than exploding on contact, gravity bombs detonate any time a ship comes within range of it. When a gravity bomb detonates, it attaches itpersonnelle to the closest ship hull within 50 [100] mètres, creating a mass shadow centered on the ship with a radius of 50 mètres that lasts for 10 minutes. A ship can attempt to dislodge the gravity bomb at the beginning of each ship turn by making a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). Any Large or smaller [Gargantuan or smaller] ships with an attached gravity bomb are unable to activate their hyperdrives.

Proximity Mine.name: Proximity Mine
Proximity Mine.description:
2200 (4400) cr

32 (65) lb

Rather than exploding on contact, proximity mines detonate any time a ship comes within range of it. When a proximity mine detonates, each ship within 100 [200] mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD 15). A ship takes 2d10 [4d10] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.
